title: RSA Encryption, Signatures, and Safe Migration · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed security review reconstructs rsa encryption, signatures, and safe migration from threat, algorithm, parameter, implementation, key-custody, failure, test-vector, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for RSA-OAEP and RSA-PSS boundary adapter after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Generate or parse supported RSA keys with minimum strength, valid public exponent, purpose, provenance, and bounded encodings.
Use RSA-OAEP only for bounded key material with matching hash and label context and uniform decryption failure.
Hash exact canonical bytes and use RSA-PSS with explicit hash and salt policy for new RSA signatures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

content.text: A review cryptographic engineering team handles case 9355 during a certificate rollover incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate RSA on trusted keys, OAEP or PSS purpose, payload limits, and uniform failure; preserve accessible status, non-color meaning, keyboard operation, error recovery, and secret-safe diagnostics; then change one authenticated byte and prove clean rejection without partial effect. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Generate or parse supported RSA keys with minimum strength, valid public exponent, purpose, provenance, and bounded encodings.

steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review cryptographic engineering team handles case 4498 during a credential migration window. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate RSA on trusted keys, OAEP or PSS purpose, payload limits, and uniform failure; record key custody, terminal failure, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk ownership; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Inventory RSA uses, migrate by purpose to modern approved alternatives, retain verified old-read windows, and remove obsolete private keys.

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration, keep Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration connected to executable Go behavior evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Inventory RSA uses, migrate by purpose to modern approved alternatives, retain verified old-read windows, and remove obsolete private keys.

hints: For Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A review cryptographic engineering team handles case 4498 during a credential migration window. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate RSA on trusted keys, OAEP or PSS purpose, payload limits, and uniform failure; record key custody, terminal failure, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk ownership; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Inventory RSA uses, migrate by purpose to modern approved alternatives, retain verified old-read windows, and remove obsolete private keys.

For Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Increasing an RSA modulus solves every long-term cryptographic migration need.
